summary: ANDROID 🟥 DSDK DFU for sub devices doesnt work
scenario: Poly Studio Mobile app crashes when starting CC or CS sub-device firmware update (DFU)
description_clean: App crashes whenever CC or CS DFU (Device Firmware Update for sub-devices) is started.
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Connect a Poly Bluetooth audio device (e.g., Voyager Focus 2 or similar CC/CS device).
Scroll to and tap 'Firmware Update' or 'Device Firmware Update'.
If prompted, select the sub-device (CC or CS) to update.
Tap 'Start Update' or 'Begin DFU' to initiate the firmware update process.
expected: The firmware update process starts normally; the app shows a progress indicator and does not crash.
actual: The app crashes immediately when the CC or CS DFU process is started.
